Infrastructure for LRTs.
Permissionless. Flexible. Modular.

Modular Liquid Restaking Primitive for Permissionless LRTs Creation & Curation
Infrastructure for institutions and sophisticated risk curators for issuing and curating LRTs with diverse risk and yield profiles.

How It Works

The system enables permissionless LRT creation allowing for unlimited risk profiles by working with diverse set of AVSes and operators.
Issue your LRT
lrtETH
Curate LRTs for an open market.
Be in Control
Determine risks, choose AVSes profile, design your framework.
Distribute easily
Integrations with DeFI protocols for asset utilization and liquid markets, designed for composability.

Supported Tokens

The system is agnostic to assets for restaking and supports any ERC-20 tokens that AVSes may need for their security mechanisms.
stETH
ETH
wETH
wstETH
WBTC
soon
USDC
soon
